name: Imaginary Friend: Gena
description: A lovely ornament modeled after Sayu's imaginary friend Gena.\nUntil the day Sayu can stand proudly on her own as a proper ninja, having her imaginary friend stand with her seems like a fine enough idea. Still, Gena appears to be remarkably gifted at shirking effort too... Which raises an important question: did it learn from Sayu, or has Sayu been learning from it?\n"Real or imaginary, it's nice to grow up with friends by your side."
